Campy Creatures

February 7, 2017

I just backed this amazing looking card game from Keymaster Games, called Campy Creatures. The game is visually appealing for sure, but it also looks super fun to play. What sold me is their assurance it would be family friendly, despite the 14+ age rating on the box.

I backed their first Kickstarter for a card game called Control. It was the best run campaign I’ve been a part of on Kickstarter. I can’t recommend this one fast enough.

Choose your creature, outwit your opponents, capture the Mortals. It's a ghoulish game of bluffing and deduction for 2–5 players.
End on End @endonend
